abv: Craft Bar Set - Stainless Steel (4 piece)
gluten_free: When you're working on your mixology skills, it makes a huge difference to have solid, dependable, good looking, easy cleaning tools in your toolkit. Plus, you'll just look so legit when you're shaking up your favorite Margarita concoction. This Craft Bar Set by A Bar Above is the best of the basics; including the three tools you need to make most common cocktails: a trusty two-piece Boston shaker, a Hawthorne strainer with extra-tight spring and a two-sided Jigger with measurement lines all the way down to 1/4 oz! And it's made from Stainless Steel 304 (That’s the high-quality, food-grade kind). So you're getting great quality, weight, and looks while being uber-useful and easy to clean up. Whether you're buying this set for yourself, or your best burgeoning barkeep buddy, it's a great set to help you shake your way to the top of your mixology game. About A Bar Above: Chris and Julia Tunstall are a husband-and-wife team who love the service industry and are dedicated to treating all of our customers like they're family. Inspired by Chris’ decade of experience as a bartender and bar manager, they created A Bar Above as a bar education site in 2013, growing over the years to add online training, a podcast, and a high quality line of premium barware.
column21: {"ingredients":"This set Includes: Two-piece Boston shaker set (18 oz unweighted & 28 oz weighted), Hawthorne cocktail strainer, Jigger: Double-sided Japanese-style jigger. All metal components are made with high-quality stainless steel 304, designed for use in high-volume bars. Gift Box is approximately 8\" L x 4\" W x 4\" H. Weighs approximately 1.4lb.And it's made from Stainless Steel 304 (That’s the high-quality, food-grade kind)."}

gluten_free: When you're building your booze-free bar, there's all kinds of ways to think about your barware. We love vintage glassware and can get behind vintage bar tools...but there's something about super sturdy, ready for the dishwasher, "can not destroy" items that hits right when you're hosting. This Stirred Cocktail Set by A Bar Above is just that. Great quality, weight, and look while being uber-useful and easy to clean up. Whether you're buying this set for yourself, or your best burgeoning barkeep buddy, it's a great set to help you craft the stirred drinks that stir your heart. gluten_free: Cape Agave is a premium non-alcoholic mezcal alternative that reimagines the intensity and smokiness of traditional mezcal with a unique botanical twist. Crafted with African sage, agave, arabica bean, mesquite, and fresh jalapeño, this zero-proof spirit delivers the complexity, depth, and smoky character mezcal lovers crave. 750ml. < 0.5% ABV. How to enjoy: it couldn't be easier! Mix up a Margarita or Paloma or drink neat over ice. Flavor profile: Cape Agave is smoky and fresh, with a hint of spice, African sage, and arabica bean—another wonderful botanical from Abstinence.
column21: {"ingredients":"Filtered Water, Distilled Botanicals, Citric Acid, Salt, Agave & Cane Sugar Natural Flavors, Natural Preservatives: Mushroom Glycolipids."}

gluten_free: This is All The Bitter's FIRST permanent addition to their epic lineup in two years - SO YOU KNOW IT'S GREAT! Made with organic decaf coffee, enjoy this complex concoction as an afternoon pick-me-up or a way to unwind in the early evening. It’s a completely different vibe you can add to just about any drink and love. Handmade in small batches in Chico, California, USA. 0.0% ABV. 4 oz glass bottle. ALCOHOL FREE | VEGAN | GLUTEN FREE | ORGANIC & WILD FORAGED How to enjoy: With layers of rich, roasted coffee flavor, Cherry Coffee Blast bitters are the perfect addition to an Old Fashioned or Manhattan, whether with or without alcohol. They also shine when simply mixed with sparkling water or tonic. Flavor profile: Handcrafted with organic decaf coffee, this bold blend features Bing cherries, roasted chicory, cocoa nibs, vanilla, cardamom, and orange peel. Bitter botanicals like gentian root, dandelion, and wild cherry bark—traditionally used to support gut health—add balance and complexity, while adaptogenic Siberian ginseng brings a mild, caffeine-free boost.
column21: {"ingredients":"Non-GMO vegetable glycerin, purified water, apple cider vinegar*, decaf coffee*, cherry*, gentian root*, chicory root*, dandelion root*, eleuthero root (Siberian ginseng)*, cocoa nibs*, wild cherry bark*, orange peel*, spices*, vanilla bean* *All botanicals organic or wild-harvested Contains trace amounts of caffeine"}

gluten_free: FLORAL AND GRASSY Sip your way to relaxation with All The Bitter's Lavender bitters! Handcrafted with organic lavender, chamomile, rose petals, and calming herbs like ashwagandha, skullcap, and passionflower, these bitters help add a teensy skosh of chillax into your day. Handmade in small batches in Chico, California, USA. 5 oz glass bottle. ALCOHOL FREE | VEGAN | GLUTEN FREE | ORGANIC & WILD FORAGED 2024 World Alcohol-Free Awards How to enjoy: All The Bitter Lavender flavor is perfect for gin cocktails and adding an uplifting note to your favorite drink. Try making a Lavender Gin & Tonic. Mix it with club soda and lemon for a refreshing botanical seltzer, or add to your chamomile tea for a relaxing nightcap. Flavor profile: Floral, grassy, and bitter flavor. Lavender forward, with rose notes and herby flavor. Contains Ashwagandha - consult your physician if you're pregnant or nursing.
column21: {"ingredients":"Non-GMO vegetable glycerin, purified water, apple cider vinegar*, lavender*, chamomile flowers*, ashwagandha root*, lemon peel*, gentian root*, rosehips*, rose petals*, skullcap*, passionflower*, blue vervain*, spices*, lemon balm* *Organic or wild foragedContains Ashwagandha - consult your physician if you're pregnant or nursing."}

gluten_free: BRIGHT AND BITTER Inspired by 19th-century apothecary Antoine Peychaud, All The Bitter's non-alcoholic New Orleans Bitters are a celebration of NOLA and American cocktail culture. With bright flavors of anise, tart cherry, hibiscus, and rosehips, these bitters stand ready to liven up any drink. Packed with organic, functional botanicals like milk thistle seed, dandelion root, and Schisandra berry, these non-alcoholic bitters may support digestion, liver health, and detoxification. Handmade in small batches in Chico, California, USA. 0.0% ABV. 4 oz glass bottle. ALCOHOL FREE | VEGAN | GLUTEN FREE | ORGANIC & WILD FORAGED LA Spirit Awards 2022: Silver Medal SF World Spirits Comp 2022: Silver Medal World AF Awards 2023: Gold Medal London Spirits Comp 2023: Silver Medal How to enjoy: The perfect choice for a Sazerac cocktail. A few dropperfuls do wonders for seltzer, tonic, beer, and non-alcoholic red wine, too. Flavor profile: Tart cherry, hibiscus, anise, and rosehips

gluten_free: CITRUS AND SPICE Crafted with three varieties of orange peel along with cardamom, coriander, and lemon balm, All the Bitter non-alcoholic Orange bitters are a big hug of orangey spiced herbal-isciousness. Handmade with organic, functional botanicals like milk thistle seed, dandelion root, and burdock, these Orange bitters may also support digestion and liver health. Handmade in small batches in Chico, California, USA. 5 oz glass bottle. ALCOHOL FREE | VEGAN | GLUTEN FREE | ORGANIC & WILD FORAGED LA Spirit Awards 2022: Gold Medal SF World Spirits Comp 2022: Bronze Medal World AF Awards 2023: Silver Medal London Spirits Comp 2023: Silver Medal How to enjoy: try All The Bitter Orange Bitters in an Old Fashioned, Negroni, or margarita. These are also reportedly shockingly good in wheat beer. Or go even easier and add to sparkling water with a squeeze of lemon for an easy, refreshing drink. Flavor profile: Bright and bitter orange, with notes of cardamom and coriander, and a hint of herbaceous je ne sais quoi.

gluten_free: Almave Ámbar is a delicious choice if you are looking for depth and complexity. Crafted with real Blue Agave in Jalisco, Mexico, Almave Ámbar boasts a deep, amber hue and the authentic taste and texture of agave, making it a non-alcoholic alternative to traditional Blue Agave spirits perfect for sipping or mixing in spirit-forward cocktails. How to enjoy: Sip neat over a large ice cube or build an Ámbar Old Fashioned. Flavor profile: Notes of brown sugar, toasted wood and allspice with subtle hints of cacao. Balanced with agave, acidity, subtle sharpness and a touch of bitterness.
column21: {"ingredients":"Blue agave hydrolate, water, concentrated blue agave extract, glycerol, agave syrup, apple cider vinegar, French oak hydrolate, natural aromas, citric acid, malic acid, oak tannins, salt, natural glycolipids."}

gluten_free: Almave Blanco pays tribute to tequila blanco’s uninhibited versatility, booze-free. Using authentic blue agave from Jalisco, Mexico, Almave Blanco perfectly balances sweet, herbal, and acidic flavors to create a full-bodied non-alcoholic alternative. The end product is a sophisticated blend of pure blue agave taste. If you're alcohol-free, or trying to drink more mindfully, Almave Blanco is a fantastic non-alcoholic spirit to add to the bar cart. How to enjoy: Perfect for mixing your favorite tequila cocktail, we like a Jalisco Mule: combine 2 oz Almave Blanco and 1/2 oz lime juice in a chilled mule mug filled with crushed ice. Top with your favorite ginger beer and stir. Garnish with candied ginger and lime. Drink well. Flavor profile: Bright fresh agave, with a hint of minerality and spice. Balanced with agave, acidity, subtle sharpness and a touch of bitterness.
column21: {"ingredients":"Blue agave hydrolate, water, blue agave syrup, glycerol, natural aromas, arabic gum, malic acid, citric acids, salt, tannins"}

gluten_free: Almave Humo is a true representation of the taste and rituals of the mezcal experience, delivering depth, intrigue, and sophistication to any cocktail. Is a groundbreaking non-alcoholic spirit made with Espadín agave harvested from the foot of volcanoes in Puebla, Mexico. Almave - delivers the true taste and experience of a smoky agave spirit without alcohol, perfect for replicating both classic and experimental mezcal cocktails. Mirroring mezcal’s historical role in celebrating community and strengthening bonds, a Humo cocktail is the perfect accompaniment for enjoying conversations and sharing good stories. How to enjoy: Mix in place of mezcal in your favorite cocktail. Or enjoy a Sol y Ceniza. Flavor profile: Herbal with warm spice, subtle piloncillo brown sugar sweetness, and a smoky finish.
column21: {"ingredients":"Espadín agave, organic agave nectar, glycerol, malic acid, citric acid, salt, natural flavors, natural mushroom, glycolipids (to preserve freshness)."}

gluten_free: Crafted in a distillery located in South Carolina, USA, Amethyst Blueberry Ginger Mint is a non-alcoholic botanical spirit with hints of ginger and mint for a subtly sweet and refreshing taste. Its clear and clean flavors make it one-of-a-kind, perfect for those looking for a unique and delicious experience. How to enjoy: pour neat or over ice or mix 1:1 with soda or tonic or build a cocktail (we love a berry bramble: Blueberry Ginger Mint, lemon juice, lime juice, simple syrup, berry kombucha, 3 dashes All The Bitter aromatic bitters. Serve in a Collins glass. Garnish with berries and a lemon peel).
column21: {"ingredients":"Water, natural botanical distillates, natural extracts, vegetable glycerin (soy), citric acid, preservatives sodium benzoate and potassium sorbate."}

gluten_free: Crafted in a distillery located in South Carolina, USA, this citrusy and herbaceous botanical is a smooth blend of clean flavor with a spiced up finish. It is great on its own, on the rocks with soda or tonic, and blends great to create a craft your own alcohol free cocktails. Amethyst Grapefruit Basil isn't trying to be anything other than an utterly delicious botanical non-alc spirit. How to enjoy: pour neat or over ice or mix 1:1 with soda or tonic or build a cocktail (we love a grapefruit basil martini: Amethyst Grapefruit Basil, lime juice, simple syrup, and freshly squeezed grapefruit juice. Serve in a chilled Martini glass. Garnish with a basil leaf and grapefruit peel).
column21: {"ingredients":"Water, natural botanical distillates, natural extracts, vegetable glycerin (soy), citric acid, preservatives sodium benzoate and potassium sorbate."}

gluten_free: Crafted in a distillery located in South Carolina, USA, this citrusy, spicy, fresh botanical is a smooth blend of clean flavor with a bit of heat (don't be afraid - it's not too spicy and uber-delicious!) Amethyst Lemon Cucumber Serrano isn't trying to be anything other than a fresh and spicy non-alc spirit you'll grab over and over on your bar. How to enjoy: pour neat or over ice or mix 1:1 with soda or tonic or build a cocktail (we love a Serrano Bloody Mary: Amethyst Lemon Cucumber Serrano, bloody mary mix, fuego bitters, and 2 dashes of tabasco. Serve in a Collins glass. Garnish with olives, pearl onions, pickled okra, lime and lemon.)

gluten_free: Crafted in a distillery located in South Carolina, USA, this melon and lime infused fresh botanical is a crisp and clean. Amethyst Watermelon Lime isn't trying to be anything other than a refreshing clean non-alc spirit you'll reach for when it's time to unwind. How to enjoy: pour neat or over ice or mix 1:1 with soda or tonic or build a cocktail (we love a Watermelon Fizz: Amethyst Watermelon Lime, lime juice, and ginger ale. Serve in a Collins glass over ice. Garnish with a lime and enjoy.)

gluten_free: Aplós Arise is a unique, non-alcoholic beverage created for social gatherings, promoting a sense of camaraderie. Carefully selected extracts are scientifically proven to amplify and motivate a lively state of mind. Arise has hints of agave flower, lemon verbena, and black sarawak, and its invigorating herbal citrus flavors are sure to delight. Aplós Arise's special blend of adaptogens are meant to enhance mood, sharpen cognitive abilities, and increase energy levels. Many users report feeling its effects after just one or two servings. Recommended Use - To enjoy, pour 2 oz over ice or mix as desired - Good for 60 days after opening, no refrigeration required In the bottle: - 20mg broad-spectrum hemp per serving for a calming and uplifting effect Flavor profile: notes of agave flower, lemon verbena, and black sarawak round out an invigorating herbal citrus profile.

gluten_free: Aplós Ease is a functional, non-alcoholic spirit for when you want to take it Ease-y. Ease is a complex blend of citrus and herbal botanicals is infused with lion’s mane, magnesium, and suntheanine (L-Theanine) to create a spirit that calms and relaxes without the negative effects of alcohol. Serve alongside thoughtful conversation or introspection. How to enjoy: To enjoy, pour 2 oz Ease over ice or with soda and a splash of citrus - best within 60 days after opening. Flavor profile: Yuzu, Basil, Shiso, and Dandelion botanicals makes for a bright, herbal, complex flavor.

gluten_free: A 4-pack of sparkling, non-alcoholic cocktails made with Aplós Ease, ume plum, oroblanco grapefruit, white tea, and sea buckthorn. Mandora Negroni is a perfect balance of bitter, citrus and sweet, with mandora orange, bitter quassia, sarsaparilla, and oakwood. It's a perfect end-of-day wind down drink. This ready to drink cocktail has Aplós' proprietary blend of nootropics - formulated to calm the mind and ease you into a relaxed state of mind. Functional Ingredients: 100mg lion’s mane, 150mg magnesium glycinate, and 150mg suntheanine (L-Theanine) per serving. How to enjoy: Pour over ice or sip from a chilled can and get chillaxed. Flavor Profile: Refreshing with citrus and bitter notes. Flavors of orange, sarsaparilla, bitter quassia, and oakwood.

gluten_free: Inspired by the iconic Kir Royale cocktail, this sparkling brew-based twist brings celebratory vibes to every pour. With bold black currant flavor at the forefront and a subtle lift from real lemon peel, this light-bodied brew is crisp, dry, and fruit-forward. Whether you're marking a milestone or simply elevating an ordinary moment, "Kir Royale" is a refreshing and refined way to raise your glass. Best served chilled and shared with a cheers.

gluten_free: Athletic Brewing Noble Pils is an elegantly stated take on the Pils, built on subtly sweet Pilsner malt and the floral, herbal character of Noble hops like Saaz and Hallertau. A medium body, measured bitterness, and crisp finish give it a flavor that’s familiar in its roots and fresh in its expression. Crafted for those who demand excellence in NA brewing, it offers refreshment and refinement that fit naturally into wherever people gather.
column21: {"ingredients":"Water, Malted Barley, Hops, Yeast, Wheat"}

gluten_free: Triple Palm is a tropical, triple-hopped IPA that’s highly refreshing and bold in flavor. It’s crafted with three types of hops added at three stages of the brewing process to create a blend of tropical fruity notes including mango, guava, lychee, citrus, honey, rose, and stone fruit.
column21: {"ingredients":"Water, Malted Barley, Wheat, Hops, Yeast"}

gluten_free: Crafted with roasted barley and hops, Nitro Emerald Cliffs is a dark, Irish-style brew with mild bitterness and medium body. An infusion of nitrogen gives it denser foam and silkier texture, allowing aromatics of sweet chocolate, coffee, and wood to shine. The result is a balanced, but indulgent drinking experience inspired by the unique beauty of Ireland’s shores. Drink it with: beef stew (or seitan stew - you do you), potatoes, and shepherd's pie Brewer's notes: Head Brewer and Co-Founder at Athletic John Walker says "An Irish-style dry. Aromas of chocolate and roasty notes add complex bitterness to this brew with a creamy, smooth finish."
column21: {"ingredients":"Water, Malted Barley, Wheat, Hops, Yeast"}

abv: Double Tasty West Coast Style IPA 6-pack
gluten_free: From pour to finish, our Double Tasty West Coast Style IPA is brewed with premium Colorado malts and a trio of standout hops—Mosaic, El Dorado, and Cascade that provide signature notes of citrus and pine with a crisp, clean finish. A touch of hop extract amplifies the aromatics, and the flavor delivers on bitterness, body, and clarity that you expect from a great beer while staying clear-headed and in control. It's proof that a mindful choice can still deliver a world-class beer experience. 6 pack. 12 oz (355 ml ) cans. <0.5% ABV.
column21: {"ingredients":"Water, malt, hops, yeast, and other natural hop flavors"}

abv: No. 5 Charred Grapefruit Tonic with Bulls Bay Sea Salt
gluten_free: Bittermilk's No. 5 Charred Grapefruit Tonic isn't your typical tonic! No.5 combines lime and lemon juice with cinchona bark, the source of quinine for tonic. Bittermilk peels fresh grapefruits and chars the skins to help bring out bitter yet refreshing notes. Just a bit of South Carolina Bulls Bay Saltworks sea salt helps pull savory caramel notes and rounds out the flavor. Produced with love in Charleston, South Carolina. 17 oz. ABV 0.0% How to enjoy: Very versatile! Works well with any light spirit. May we suggest a Pinky Swear? Add 3 parts non-alcoholic Gin, 2 parts No. 5, and a good handful of fresh mint to an ice-filled shaker, shake well, and strain into a tall glass. Garnish with a sprig of mint. Flavor profile: Bitter and refreshing with citrus notes.
column21: {"ingredients":"Fresh Lime and Lemon Juices, Florida Golden Cane Sugar, Charred Grapefruit Peel, Cinchona Bark, Spices, Bulls Bay Sea Salt"}

gluten_free: Bittermilk's No. 6 Oaxacan Old Fashioned First, let's talk pronunciation. Pronounced “weh-HAH-ken,” No. 6's flavors are strong and bittersweet with Old Fashioned spices and chiles. It's a celebration of the flavors of Oaxaca, Mexico, using dried Mexican chilies, cocoa nibs, and spices, sweetened with raisins and aged with cocoa husks from French Broad Chocolates in Asheville, NC. Produced with love in Charleston, South Carolina. 17 oz. ABV 0.0% How to enjoy: At its very best mixed with mezcal, the source of inspiration for this mixer. Stir 1 part mixer to 4 parts Mezcal with ice and garnish with a lime twist. Flavor profile: Bittersweet, cocoa, and chilies
column21: {"ingredients":"Florida Golden Cane Sugar, Water, Raisin Juice Concentrate, Cocoa Fines, Dried Chiles, Spices, Cinchona Bark, Tartaric Acid"}
